compiled_state.title: Implement _tag_add and _tag_remove in ticket-lib.sh
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
Add _tag_add and _tag_remove to plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib.sh. Delegates to 'ticket show <id>' (authoritative Python reducer) for current tag state — no duplicate event-walking logic.

testing_mode: GREEN (makes tests 1-5 from test-ticket-tag.sh pass; tests 6-7 remain RED via markers)

_tag_add <ticket_id> <tag>:
- Read current tags: ticket show <id> | python3 -c "import json,sys; print(','.join(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tags',[])))"
- If tag already present: exit 0 (no-op, no event written)
- Otherwise: construct temp EDIT event JSON (timestamp, uuid, event_type=EDIT, env_id from .env-id, author from git config user.name, data.fields.tags=[existing+new]) using inline python3 matching ticket-migrate-brainstorm-tags.sh pattern
- Note: inlines JSON construction rather than delegating to ticket-edit.sh to avoid ghost-check find() call and keep ticket-lib.sh self-contained
- Pass temp file path to write_commit_event

_tag_remove <ticket_id> <tag>:
- Same current-tags delegation
- If tag absent: exit 0 (no-op)
- Construct temp EDIT event JSON with data.fields.tags=[remaining]; empty set uses [] not null
- Pass temp file to write_commit_event

AC: after source plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib.sh, declare -f _tag_add | grep -q _tag_add exits 0
AC: tests 1-5 pass GREEN, tests 6-7 remain RED (exempted), bash tests/run-all.sh passes

Files: plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib.sh (EDIT)
